rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Elec. Code §279.001, which merely defines election-related terms. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: "County election officer" means an individual employed by a county as an elections administrator, voter registrar, county clerk, or other officer with responsibilities relating to the administration of elections.
_note: No conflict. Elec. Code §279.001 definitions chapter is unrelated to Tax Code homestead exemption amounts.
